name: Standing Committee on Finance
text: Standing Committee on Finance. Chairman: Jayant Sinha (BJP). 31 members (21 Lok Sabha + 10 Rajya Sabha). Examines bills and policies related to Finance, Corporate Affairs, Planning. Reviews RBI, SEBI, banking sector performance.

name: Standing Committee on Defence
text: Standing Committee on Defence. Chairman: Radha Mohan Singh (BJP). 31 members. Reviews defence procurement, armed forces modernization, border security. Examines Defence Ministry budget and grant demands.

name: Standing Committee on Health
text: Standing Committee on Health and Family Welfare. Chairman: Ram Gopal Yadav (SP). 31 members. Reviews public health policy, AIIMS functioning, medical education, Ayushman Bharat, pandemic preparedness.

name: Standing Committee on Home Affairs
text: Standing Committee on Home Affairs. Chairman: Brij Lal (BJP). 31 members. Reviews internal security, police reforms, border management, disaster management, census, CRPF and BSF operations.

name: Standing Committee on Education
text: Standing Committee on Education, Women, Children, Youth and Sports. Chairman: Vivek Thakur. 31 members. Reviews NEP implementation, university governance, mid-day medals, and sports infrastructure.

name: Standing Committee on IT
text: Standing Committee on Communications and IT. Chairman: Prataprao Jadhav (BJP). 31 members. Reviews telecom policy, internet governance, digital India projects, cybersecurity, and social media regulation.

name: Standing Committee on Agriculture
text: Standing Committee on Agriculture, Animal Husbandry and Food Processing. 31 members. Reviews agricultural policy, MSP, PM-KISAN, food processing industry, animal husbandry, and dairy development.

name: Public Accounts Committee (PAC)
text: Public Accounts Committee (PAC). Chairman: K.C. Venugopal (INC). 22 members (15 LS + 7 RS). Examines CAG audit reports. Most powerful financial committee. Holds government accountable for expenditure. By convention, chaired by opposition MP.

name: Estimates Committee
text: Estimates Committee. Chairman: Sanjay Jaiswal (BJP). 30 members (all from Lok Sabha). Reviews budget estimates. Suggests economies, alternative policies, and organizational improvements across ministries.

name: Committee on Public Undertakings
text: Committee on Public Undertakings (COPU). 22 members (15 LS + 7 RS). Examines working of public sector enterprises like BHEL, SAIL, NTPC. Reviews CAG audit reports on PSUs. Suggests performance improvements.
